---
name: New AI Agent Component (Skill/Workflow/MCP)
about: Propose a new AI Agent integration, workflow, or skill
title: "[AGENT] "
labels: new-skill, enhancement
assignees: ivannikov-pro
---

**Type of AI Component**
- [ ] Skill (`skills/`)
- [ ] Workflow (`workflows/`)
- [ ] MCP Server (`mcp/`)

**Name of Component**
e.g., `awesome-dev-workflow` or `postgres-db-mcp`

**Description**
Provide a short overview of what this agent connection or workflow will help achieve.

**Business Value & Use Cases**
When and why would an AI assistant invoke this skill/workflow?

**Is this an Offensive Risk Component?**
- [ ] Yes (Provides risky file/system access or performs unauthorized changes)
- [ ] No (Safe reading, generic code formatting)

If yes, ensure the final pull request contains the `AUTHORIZED USE ONLY` disclaimer in the markdown file.
